text: Claim No: ENF 006/2010 THE JUDICIAL AUTHORITY OF THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE Between:

ORDER OF EXECUTION THIS ORDER OF EXECUTION WAS ISSUED by the Registrar of the Dubai International Financial Centre Courts ("DIFC Courts"), Ground Level, Building 4, Dubai, UAE on 25 February 2010 on the written application of Sengul Deniz dated 10 February 2010. The name and address for enforcement is: Amanah Xdata, Dubai International Financial Centre, Level 6, Building 3,
P.O. Box 506699, Dubai, UAE. BY ORDER OF THE COURTS TO: Amna Al Owais, a person authorised to enforce Orders of Execution issued from the DIFC Courts. YOU ARE NOW

COMMANDED to seize in execution the goods, chattels and other property of the Defendant as authorised by law and raise therefrom the sums detailed in the Schedule, and after execution to pay the Claimant, Sengul Deniz the said sums. YOU ARE ALSO COMMANDED to endorse on this Order after execution a statement of the manner in which you have executed it and send a copy of the
statement to the Defendant.   Mark Beer Registrar Date of Issue: 25 February 2010 At: 1.00pm
SCHEDULE TO ORDER OF EXECUTION IN ENF 006/2010

table_body:
(1) Date of Order12 January 2010
(2) Amount of OrderAED 22,405.63 plus court fees of AED 367.50
TotalAED 22,773.13

text: Together with: Judgment interest from the date the judgment was entered, 12 January 2010, at the rate of $1 \%$ over the Emirates Interbank Offer Rate ("EIBOR") until the date of full payment of this Order. EIBOR is in reference to the EIBOR three months' reference rate as at the date of judgment.
